title: adonis dentata var. intermedia
intro: Adonis dentata var. intermedia, commonly known as the white Adonis or mountain Adonis, is a perennial plant species within the buttercup family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and rhizomes, which contain saponins and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In traditional medicine, Adonis dentata var. intermedia is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
